scripts.dev:next: node scripts/assert-local-auth-secret.mjs && node scripts/ensure-node-memory.mjs && . ./scripts/.node-memory-exports.sh && npx next dev
scripts.prebuild: node ../scripts/ensure-build-toolchain.mjs && npm run guard:build-scripts && npm run build:prepare-content
scripts.build:server: node scripts/ensure-node-memory.mjs && . ./scripts/.node-memory-exports.sh && BUILD_TARGET=server npx tsx ../script/build.ts && node ../scripts/verify-dist-artifacts.mjs
scripts.build:client: node scripts/ensure-node-memory.mjs && . ./scripts/.node-memory-exports.sh && BUILD_TARGET=client npx tsx ../script/build.ts && node ../scripts/verify-dist-artifacts.mjs
scripts.build:heavy: node scripts/ensure-node-memory.mjs && . ./scripts/.node-memory-exports.sh && BUILD_TARGET=heavy RUN_HEAVY_BUILD_TASKS=1 npx tsx ../script/build.ts && node ../scripts/verify-dist-artifacts.mjs
scripts.build:deploy:postbuild: node scripts/assert-deploy-git-state.mjs && node scripts/verify-dockerfile-npm-scripts.mjs && node scripts/ensure-standalone-static.mjs && node scripts/ensure-standalone-public.mjs && npm run verify:standalone-artifact && node scripts/post-build-prune.mjs
scripts.qa:release-gate:guest: node scripts/validate-release-gate-env.mjs && npx playwright test -c playwright.release-gate.config.ts --project=release-health --project=release-phase-1-guest --project=release-free-user
scripts.qa:release-gate:health: node scripts/validate-release-gate-env.mjs && npx playwright test -c playwright.release-gate.config.ts --project=release-health
scripts.qa:release-gate:paid: node scripts/validate-release-gate-env.mjs && npx playwright test -c playwright.release-gate.config.ts --project=release-blocking-paid --project=release-synthetic-paid-smoke
scripts.qa:release-gate:mobile: node scripts/validate-release-gate-env.mjs && npx playwright test -c playwright.release-gate.config.ts --project=release-mobile
scripts.qa:release-gate: node scripts/validate-release-gate-env.mjs && npx playwright test -c playwright.release-gate.config.ts
scripts.visual-qa:auth: node scripts/validate-visual-qa-env.mjs --require-paid-creds && npx playwright test -c playwright.visual-qa.config.ts --project=setup-visual-qa-auth
scripts.capture:rn-practice-cat-mockups: npm run capture:rn-cat-exam-in-session && npm run capture:rn-practice-exam-in-session && npm run capture:rn-practice-exam-hub
scripts.visual-qa:capture: node scripts/validate-visual-qa-env.mjs && node scripts/validate-visual-qa-env.mjs --require-learner-visual-storage && npx playwright test -c playwright.visual-qa.config.ts --project=visual-qa-route-pack
scripts.visual-qa:critical: node scripts/validate-visual-qa-env.mjs --require-learner-visual-storage && npx playwright test -c playwright.visual-qa.config.ts --project=visual-qa-critical-regression
scripts.aesthetic-before-after:all: npm run aesthetic-before-after:capture && npm run aesthetic-before-after:build
scripts.test:e2e:aesthetic-audit:full: npm run test:e2e:aesthetic-audit && npm run aesthetic-audit:report
scripts.qa:predeploy:low-memory: npm run typecheck:critical && npm run test:unit:flashcards && npm run test:unit:practice && npm run test:unit:stripe && npm run test:unit:onboarding && npm run qa:release-gate:list
scripts.release:full-audit: npm run validate:production-surface && npm run sitemap:validate && npm run sitemap:report && npm run seo:guardrails
scripts.ci:verify: npm run db:generate && npm run typecheck && npm run content:source-of-truth:check && npm run guard:build-scripts && npm run build
scripts.check:server:guardrails: npm run check:storage && npm run check:server:isolation && npm run check:server
scripts.i18n:ci: npm run i18n:compile && npm run i18n:validate:production && npm run i18n:check-drift && npm run i18n:report-placeholder-fallbacks
scripts.i18n:audit:all: npm run i18n:audit:en && npm run i18n:audit:fr && npm run i18n:audit:es && npm run i18n:audit:hi && npm run i18n:audit:tl && npm run i18n:audit:pt && npm run i18n:seo:verify
scripts.i18n:repair-marketing: npm run i18n:compile && cd nursenest-core && npm run i18n:sync-audited-to-marketing-en && cd .. && npm run i18n:compile && cd nursenest-core && npm run i18n:fill-marketing-nav-footer-overlays && cd .. && npm run i18n:compile && npm run i18n:validate && npm run i18n:check-drift && cd nursenest-core && npm run i18n:validate-nav
scripts.mobile:typecheck: npm -w @nursenest/mobile-shared run typecheck && npm -w @nursenest/mobile-app run typecheck
